content.text: I found the likely root cause: the X11 portal file picker converts returned file URIs using `new Uri(s).AbsolutePath`, which preserves percent-encoding such as `%20` instead of returning a filesystem path with spaces. I’ll add a small temporary regression test around this conversion before changing the implementation.

	<PropertyGroup>

	</PropertyGroup>

	<Import Project="../targetframework-override.props" />

	<PropertyGroup>
		<AssemblyName>Uno</AssemblyName>

		<UnoDisableAnalyzersForSamples>true</UnoDisableAnalyzersForSamples>

		<NoWarn>$(NoWarn);NU1701</NoWarn>

		<ProduceReferenceAssembly>false</ProduceReferenceAssembly>
		<Deterministic>true</Deterministic>

	<ItemGroup>

		<RootNamespace>Uno.WinUI.Runtime.Skia.X11</RootNamespace>

		<AdditionalFiles Include="dbus-interfaces/org.freedesktop.portal.FileChooser.xml" Namespace="Uno.WinUI.Runtime.Skia.X11.DBus" GenerateDBusTypes="true" />

	<ItemGroup>
		<PackageReference Include="SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux" />

	<ItemGroup>

	<ItemGroup>
		<Content Include="buildTransitive/*.*">
			<Pack>true</Pack>
			<PackagePath>buildTransitive</PackagePath>
		</Content>
	</ItemGroup>
</Project>

Implemented the Linux/X11 file picker path fix.

What changed:
- Updated `src/Uno.UI.Runtime.Skia.X11/Storage/Pickers/LinuxFilePickerExtension.cs`
- Replaced `new Uri(s).AbsolutePath` with `new Uri(uri).LocalPath` via a helper:
  - `AbsolutePath` preserves escaped characters like `%20`
  - `LocalPath` returns the decoded filesystem path, so spaces remain spaces

Root-cause classification:
- **root-cause fix**: the picker was converting portal file URIs to paths using `Uri.AbsolutePath`, which keeps URI escaping. This produced invalid local file paths such as `/tmp/my%20file.txt`, causing `StorageFile.OpenAsync()` to target the wrong path.

Temporary tests:
- Added a temporary regression test for `file:///tmp/folder%20with%20spaces/test%20file.txt`
- Verified it produced `/tmp/folder with spaces/test file.txt`
- Removed the temporary test files afterward, per instruction
- Restored the temporary regression test project modifications

Validation evidence:
- **Code review assessment**: The portal returns file URIs. `Uri.LocalPath` is the correct API for converting a file URI to a decoded local filesystem path before creating `StorageFile`.
- **Compile validation**: Ran `dotnet build /testbed/src/Uno.UI.Runtime.Skia.X11/Uno.UI.Runtime.Skia.X11.csproj -p:NuGetAudit=false`; build completed successfully.
- **Runtime validation**: Full interactive X11 file picker runtime validation was not run in this environment. I did run a targeted temporary path-decoding regression check, which passed.

Notes:
- I did not commit changes.
- Existing unrelated working tree changes remain untouched:
  - `src/Uno.UI.RemoteControl.Messaging/...` deletions/untracked renames
- The only intended source change is:
  - `src/Uno.UI.Runtime.Skia.X11/Storage/Pickers/LinuxFilePickerExtension.cs`
